name: petal
title: Petal - Offline Voice to Text
description: Control Petal from Raycast: start/stop recording, search history, switch models, and copy the last transcription.
author: aayush9029

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.subtitle: Petal
commands.description: Start recording in Petal via deep link

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.subtitle: Petal
commands.description: Stop recording in Petal via deep link

commands.name: search-history
commands.title: Search History
commands.subtitle: Petal
commands.description: Search and copy Petal transcription history

commands.name: copy-last-transcription
commands.title: Copy Last Transcription
commands.subtitle: Petal
commands.description: Copy the latest Petal transcription to clipboard

preferences.name: historyDir
preferences.title: History Directory
preferences.description: Folder where Petal stores history.json and transcript files.

preferences.name: modelsDir
preferences.title: Models Directory
preferences.description: Folder where Petal stores downloaded model files.
